prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次分别为11582→10225→11859→23328→14815，整体波动较大；2024年因新高考改革科类调整出现位次大幅后移至23328，20 25年回弹至14815，近两年呈后移趋势，2025年基准约14815名；2021–2025年理科组计划数分别为8→8→6→9→11人，呈逐步扩招态势；2026年物理类计划大 幅增至19人，较2025年扩招约73%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有较大缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第48名，近 年排名稳定在44–53名区间，属于全国师范类顶尖院校之一；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要因该校硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人、报考预估突破1.5万），显示 在教育学领域的高人气；抖音热度总排名第67位（一般），2024年曾达高热；2021–2025年无投档断档记录，报考稳定性较好；第五轮学科评估中，马克思主义 理论A+、教育学A+、世界史A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，其中3个A+，学科实力突出，对师范类、文科类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等理工科专业社会热度高热推荐，师范/教育类呈分化观望；本省2026年考生总数474900人，物理类估算约313200人，较2025年物理类266425人增长约 17.6%，竞争加剧；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，距江西省较远，属于跨省报考；该校在江西省招生规模较小（2025 年物理类11人），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14815名、2026年物理类计划大幅扩招73%对竞争的缓解作用、本省物理类考生增长约17.6%带 来的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏正面等因素；考虑考生规模增长部分抵消扩招效应，小幅修正后预测最低位次约21080名，区间20580–21580名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学（师范）、统计学）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（物理学（师范）、电子信息科学与技术、材料物理）
- 化学（师范类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物科学类（生物科学（师范）、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类计划大幅扩招至19人，位次预计后移至约21080名。建议位次在20580–21580区间内的考生以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如20000 名以内）可重点冲刺数学类、计算机类等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were 11582 → 10225 → 11859 → 23328 → 14815, showing significant fluctuations; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and subject category adjustments, the ranking dropped sharply to 23328, rebounding to 14815 in 2025, with a backward trend in recent two years, and the baseline for 2025 is approximately 14815; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for the Science Group were 8 → 8 → 6 → 9 → 11, showing a gradual expansion; in 2026, the planned enrollment for Physics Category significantly increased to 19, an expansion of about 73% compared to 2025, which has a considerable alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 44–53 in recent years, making it one of the top normal universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its master's programs (planned to enroll 3100, with estimated applications exceeding 15,000), showing high popularity in the field of education; Douyin popularity ranks 67th overall (average), with high heat in 2024; there have been no record of admission gaps from 2021 to 2025, indicating good application stability; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Marxist Theory, Education, and World History, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology and Biology, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, including 3 A+, highlighting outstanding disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts normal and liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication and other science and engineering majors are highly recommended in social popularity, while normal/education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; in 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is 474,900, with an estimated 313,200 in Physics Category, an increase of about 17.6% compared to 266,425 in 2025, intensifying competition; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, relatively far from Jiangxi Province, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province is small (11 in Physics Category in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 14815 in 2025, the significant expansion of 73% in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 alleviating competition, the increase of about 17.6% in Physics Category candidates in this province intensifying competition, and the slightly positive reputation; taking into account that the growth in candidate numbers partially offsets the expansion effect, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21080, with a range of 20580–21580.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal), Statistics)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (Physics (Normal), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Chemistry (Normal)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Sciences (Normal), Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment significantly expands to 19, with rankings expected to shift backward to approximately 21080. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the 20580–21580 range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20000) can focus on reaching for top-tier majors such as Mathematics and Computer Science.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 跨省报考，江西省距吉林省较远；该校在江西省文科招生规模较小（2025年历史类12人），地域偏好影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including history category) were 1897 → 2064 → 1962 → 2927 → 3794, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1832 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 3794; the planned enrollment numbers for the liberal arts group from 2021 to 2025 were 7 → 10 → 10 → 8 → 12, increasing to 12 in 2025; in 2026, the history category plan is reduced to 9, a 25% decrease compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 44–53 range, making it a top-tier normal university nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with high popularity among master's applicants; Douyin popularity ranks 67th overall (average), but reached high popularity in 2024; no admission gaps from 2021 to 2025, indicating stable application; Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts students. Normal/education fields show divergent wait-and-see attitudes, with law recommended, Chinese language/literature recommended; the estimated number of history category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 161,700, a decrease of about 21.5% from 206,055 in 2025, significantly reducing competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Cross-province application, Jiangxi Province is relatively far from Jilin Province; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Jiangxi is small (12 history category students in 2025), with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3794, the 25% reduction in history category enrollment in 2026 intensifying competition, the approximately 21.5% decrease in provincial history category examinees significantly easing competition, and the slightly positive reputation, etc.; given the substantial decrease in examinee numbers, after minor correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3195, with a range of 2695–3695.
